title: session-stream-jsonl v1.0.0
description: JSONL record written by the agent CLI adapter into the airlock session-stream volume. Exactly these fields — no extra/raw_payload catch-all. See README.md for field semantics.

ts.description: Wall-clock timestamp (epoch seconds, UTC) at which the agent CLI emitted the record.

session_id.description: Agent CLI session identifier; opaque to interlock.

source.description: Which agent CLI emitted the record; selects the per-CLI adapter.

event_type.description: Normalised event type the adapter assigns: user, assistant, tool_call, tool_result, system, …

transcript_path.description: Source transcript file when the adapter parsed an on-disk record; null for synthesised entries.

assistant_text.description: Assistant turn text the adapter extracted; null on non-assistant records.

correlation_id.description: Arbiter context_id propagated through interlock's in-process verdict map; null when no verdict precedes the record.
